instagram.caption:
Security tip: Recommended Study Timeline

Plan for approximately 6-10 weeks of dedicated study. Here is a suggested weekly breakdown: Week 1: Identity: Microsoft Entra ID, users/groups, RBAC basics Week 2: Identity: Subscriptions, management ...

- Week 1: Identity: Microsoft Entra ID, users/groups, RBAC basics
- Week 2: Identity: Subscriptions, management groups, Azure Policy, governance
- Week 3: Storage: Storage accounts, access tiers, replication options
- Week 4: Storage: Azure Files, Blob Storage, security (SAS, encryption)
